Required evidence: Enclosure opening screw bosses button/LED/display alignment and keep-out drawing
Pass condition: Front-board outline and mounting align with service cover without forcing PB-100 or LB-100 layout changes
Blocked action: Do not create FB-100.kicad_pcb board outline before mechanical evidence closes

Required evidence: Connector orientation insertion clearance cable strain relief shield/chassis policy and ESD return review
Pass condition: USB service connector is accessible and protected without back-powering LB-100 or PB-100
Blocked action: Do not place USB-C footprint or release fabrication package before service evidence closes

Required evidence: Status RGB and channel indicator light-pipe or panel-window review
Pass condition: Indicators remain role-free OUT1..OUT10 or status labels and are visible in enclosure
Blocked action: Do not create silkscreen or light-pipe geometry with accessory role names

Required evidence: SERVICE and RESET actuator travel debounce sealing and boot/reset ownership review
Pass condition: Button actions are reachable service actions and cannot trigger unsafe output states
Blocked action: Do not place button footprints before actuator and safety review closes

Required evidence: Display module size connector DNP default service cover visibility and power budget review
Pass condition: OLED footprint can be DNP without breaking service UI and does not exceed LB-100 budget if populated
Blocked action: Do not place OLED keep-out or connector before population decision closes

Required evidence: JLCPCB/PCBWay package review plus no-layout validator result
Pass condition: No FB-100 PCB layout Gerbers drills pick-place BOM/CPL or manufacturing ZIP exists before freeze
Blocked action: Do not create manufacturing outputs before FB-100 schematic freeze closes
